item.title: NDR 1 Radio MV Nachrichten
item.description: Nachrichten und Informationen aus Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland und der Welt von NDR 1 Radio MV. Feed: https://www.ndr.de/podcast/podcast4426.xml

item.title: Nicholas W. Gentile, "Enemies to Their Country: The Marblehead Addressers and Consensus in the American Revolution" (U Mass Press, 2025)
item.description: Nicholas W. Gentile complicates our understanding of the American Revolution through a microhistory of one Massachusetts town in his new book, Enemies to Their Country﻿: The Marblehead Addressers and Consensus in the American Revolution ﻿﻿(U Mass Press, 2025)... Feed: https://feeds.megaphone.fm/LIT4543917034
